methods.name: deploy
methods.desc: Deploy the contract, setting the owner as provided and initializing global state.

methods.name: update
methods.desc: Allows the owner to update the smart contract

methods.name: destroy
methods.desc: Destroy the smart contract, sending all Algo to the owner account. This can only be done if there are no active cards

methods.name: setWithdrawalTimeout

args.name: seconds
args.desc: New number of seconds to wait

methods.desc: Set the number of seconds a withdrawal request must wait until being withdrawn

methods.name: setWithdrawalPubkey
methods.desc: Sets the withdrawal public key.

methods.name: cardCreate

args.name: cardOwner
args.desc: The card holder who will own/control the card

args.name: asset
args.desc: Asset to opt-in to. 0 = No asset opt-in

returns.desc: Newly generated account used by their card

methods.desc:
Create a card. This generates a brand new account and funds the minimum balance requirement
from the contract (owner-sponsored). Only the owner can call this function.

methods.name: cardClose
methods.desc: Close account. This permanently removes the rekey and deletes the account from the ledger

methods.name: cardRecover

args.name: newCardHolder
args.desc: - The address of the new card holder.

methods.desc:
Recovers funds from an old card and transfers them to a new card.
Only the owner of the contract can perform this operation.

methods.name: cardDebit

args.name: card
args.desc: The card from which the asset will be debited.

args.name: amount
args.desc: The amount of the asset to be debited.

methods.desc:
Debits the specified amount of the given asset from the card account.
Only the owner of the contract can perform this operation.

The AutoDraw lsig binds `card` and `cardOwner` to the axfer receiver, so verifying here that
`cardOwner` owns `card` prevents the delegated draw from funding (and subsequently
debiting) a card the account does not own.

methods.name: getNextCardNonce
methods.desc: Retrieves the next available nonce for the card.

methods.name: getCardData
methods.desc: Retrieves the card data for a given card address.

methods.name: getOmnibusAddress

returns.desc: The omnibus address for the asset.

methods.desc: Retrieves the omnibus address for the specified asset.

methods.name: setOmnibusAddress

args.name: newOmnibusAddress
args.desc: The new omnibus address to be set.

methods.desc:
Sets the omnibus address.
Only the owner of the contract can call this method.

methods.name: cardDisableAsset

args.name: asset
args.desc: - The ID of the asset to be removed.

methods.desc:
Allows the card holder (or owner) to CloseOut of an asset, reducing the minimum balance
requirement of the account. The freed MBR remains within the card account.

methods.name: withdrawalRequest
methods.desc: Allows the card holder to request a withdrawal of an amount of assets from the account

methods.name: withdrawalCancel
methods.desc: Allows the card holder to cancel a withdrawal request

methods.name: withdraw
methods.desc: Allows the card holder to send an amount of assets from the account

methods.name: withdrawPermissioned

args.name: asset
args.desc: - The ID of the asset to be withdrawn.

args.name: expiresAt
args.desc: - The expiry of the withdrawal signature.

methods.desc: Withdraws funds before the withdrawal timestamp has lapsed, by using the permissioned withdrawal signature provided by partner.

methods.name: transferOwnership

args.name: newOwner
args.desc: The address of the new owner.

methods.desc:
Transfers the ownership of the contract to a new owner.
Requires the caller to be the current owner.

methods.name: recoverAsset

args.name: asset
args.desc: Asset ID of the asset to recover. If 0, Algo will be recovered.

args.name: amount
args.desc: Amount of the asset to recover. If Algos, remember the minimum balance requirement.

args.name: recipient
args.desc: Address to send the recovered asset to.

methods.desc: Recover an asset sent to the contract by mistake. Only the owner can call this function.
